summary: Comprehensive testing of admin fixes (ProductBoxEditor allowedFields), migration endpoints, and mobile UI overhaul. All 15 backend tests passed. All key frontend features verified. One critical bug found and fixed in CareMobilePage.jsx (vibe function missing).

ui_bugs.issue: vibe function not defined - caused ReferenceError when clicking Care Services tab. FIXED by adding vibe() function at line 57.
ui_bugs.priority: HIGH - was causing uncaught runtime error overlay

integration_issues.issue: Go Services tab shows 'Loading Go services...' indefinitely - services may not be returning from API in GoMobilePage

issues: GoMobilePage uses custom '.go-tab' class instead of design system '.ios-tab-bar' class. Care page uses ios-tab-bar correctly. Go page has different implementation.
'PET CONCIERGE®' ticker at 11px and 'India's first Pet Life OS' at 13px - both below 14px minimum. These are in global nav components, not mobile page content.

test_results.admin_login: PASS - aditya/lola4304 login working, JWT token returned
test_results.migration_legacy_services: PASS - POST /api/admin/migrate/legacy-services returns success=true, services_master populated
test_results.migration_soul_products: PASS - POST /api/admin/migrate/soul-products returns success=true, products_master populated
test_results.product_box_loads: PASS - 7519 products loading correctly in UnifiedProductBox
test_results.is_active_toggle: PASS - Active→Inactive toggle works in table row, saves correctly with toast notification
test_results.product_box_editor_save: PASS - Full ProductBoxEditor opens with 6 tabs, Commerce tab has is_active toggle, Save Product shows 'Product saved successfully' toast
test_results.is_active_in_allowed_fields: PASS - Confirmed in code (line 234): is_active, ai_image_prompt, categories, inventory, mira_ai, mrp, shape, suitability all in allowedFields array
test_results.care_mobile_page: PASS - mobile-page-container, ios-tab-bar (3 tabs), ios-h1 (34px Cormorant Garamond), ios-btn-primary all found
test_results.care_mobile_fonts: PASS - font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display confirmed
test_results.go_mobile_page: PASS - data-testid='go-mobile' found, mobile-page-container rendered, system fonts confirmed
test_results.go_mobile_fonts: PASS - all content text >= 14px, -apple-system font family confirmed
test_results.product_detail_modal_bottom_sheet: PASS - Modal has items-end (mobile bottom), border-radius 28px 28px 0 0, slideUp animation confirmed
test_results.service_booking_modal_css: PASS - ios-bottom-sheet-content CSS rule loaded in browser, ios-drag-handle in code at line 349
test_results.mobile_design_system_loaded: PASS - mobile-design-system.css imported in index.css, CSS rules verified in browser
test_results.vibe_fix: PASS - CareMobilePage.jsx vibe function added, no more ReferenceError on Care Services tab

action_items: FIXED (by testing agent): CareMobilePage.jsx vibe function was missing - fixed by adding function vibe(t='light') at line 57
MINOR: GoMobilePage uses custom '.go-tab' class instead of design system '.ios-tab-bar' - consider migrating to ios-tab-bar for consistency
MINOR: Go Services tab shows loading indefinitely - check GoMobilePage Services section API integration
MINOR: Global nav elements (ticker, PET CONCIERGE badge) have text < 14px - consider increasing to 14px minimum
critical_code_review_comments: CareMobilePage.jsx was missing the vibe() haptic feedback function (defined in all other mobile pages: GoMobilePage, PlayMobilePage, etc.) - caused runtime error on Care Services tab click. FIXED.
GoMobilePage uses go-tab CSS class (custom) instead of ios-tab-bar from design system - slight inconsistency with CareMobilePage which properly uses ios-tab-bar
ServiceBookingModal correctly uses ios-bottom-sheet-content class at line 348 and ios-drag-handle at line 349 - implementation verified in code and CSS loaded
ProductDetailModal correctly uses items-end sm:items-center + border-radius:28px 28px 0 0 + slideUp animation - confirmed working in browser
Migration endpoints use verify_admin (HTTP Basic Auth only), not verify_admin_auth (Bearer Token) - this is by design but means API calls require Basic Auth not JWT Bearer

success_rate.frontend: 90% (vibe bug found+fixed, minor design inconsistency in GoMobilePage tabs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All main features verified. Admin at /admin with aditya/lola4304. ProductBoxEditor allowedFields includes is_active, ai_image_prompt, categories, inventory, mira_ai, mrp, shape, suitability (confirmed code + API test). Migration endpoints use HTTP Basic Auth only (not Bearer token). CareMobilePage vibe bug FIXED by T1 (added vibe function at line 57). GoMobilePage renders at 390px but uses go-tab class not ios-tab-bar. ProductDetailModal bottom sheet confirmed working: items-end + 28px border-radius + slideUp. ServiceBookingModal has ios-bottom-sheet-content + ios-drag-handle in code. Mobile design system CSS loaded and verified.

rca_of_bug.root_cause: The vibe() function is a locally-defined haptic feedback helper present in all other mobile pages (GoMobilePage.jsx:43, PlayMobilePage.jsx:44, etc.) but was NOT added to CareMobilePage.jsx during the mobile UI overhaul. The function is called at 4 places in CareMobilePage but was never defined.
rca_of_bug.fix: Added `function vibe(t='light') { if(navigator?.vibrate) navigator.vibrate(t==='medium'?[12]:[6]); }` at line 57 of CareMobilePage.jsx
rca_of_bug.reproduction: Navigate to /care at 390px viewport, click '✂️ Care Services' tab - causes uncaught runtime error overlay
